title: Channel Estimation OFDM/MIMO Spec (5G NR pilot family)

E.forward: y = H * x_pilot + n; H parameterized by h in C**{L_ch}
E.inverse: estimate h from y and known pilot pattern

B.causality: h[l] = 0 for l < 0 or l >= L_ch

d_spec_notes: Distance from mmWave beam-domain channel spec ~= 0.30 (Similar, different beam dim). Distance from 386 CS ~= 0.40 (Related, both rely on sparsity in specific basis).

s1_s4_justifications.S1: H in C**{Nr x Nt x L_ch}, pilot-matrix dimensions consistent under 5G NR spec.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: LS unique when N_pilot >= L_ch and kappa(X_pilot**H X_pilot) finite; sparse recovery under RIP for mmWave.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: LS closed-form; MMSE closed-form given Rhh; OMP terminates in k; deep learned methods feed-forward.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates; LS fails at alpha_p<<k/L_ch (hardness).
